scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.example:inspect: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsx src/inspect.ts
scripts.interop:live: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsx src/interop-live.ts
scripts.interop:trace: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsx src/interop-trace.ts
scripts.example:resource-write: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsx src/resource-write.ts
scripts.example:sign: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsx src/sign-and-verify.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
